reviews.review_description: Good

I’m a high school softball coach and as a team we are using this. So far, everything is working great except the tracking of the bat at times. I noticed that when swinging the bat with the attachment the virtual bat will be a foot off from where the actual bat is. Overall great product.

I got this for my 10 year old daughter and after two weeks, timing and plate discipline improvements were very noticeable.  Seeing hundreds of game speed reps has been invaluable.  The best part is she thinks she’s playing a video game and enjoys putting in the reps any chance she gets!

Very realistic! and fun to play. It makes me help to improve my batting timing and eye to see ball and strike. also I can learn how recognize the pitching style. One thing I want to update is that I want to use right controller when I do batting cage. So please make a option that user can choose a controller for swing. Cuz I am right handed and its grip feel is more comfortable using right controller to swing. and I hope you make a option that let users can do nonstop batting practice without pushing next pitch button and watching countdown 3 2 1.

reviews.review_title: Great app and even better coaching staff
reviews.review_description:
The WinReality app gives hitters a training opportunity that has never been available in the history of baseball. Hitters of all ages have unlimited access to drills and live pitching that will allow them to reach their full potential if they put in the work. 

What makes this app truly 5 stars is the service provided by the WinReality staff. 
Every step of the way the staff was texting me and guiding me through the set up process which was very helpful. 

WinReality also offers unlimited zoom meetings with knowledgeable hitting coaches at no extra costs. These coaches help set up training plans custom to you and your training needs.

Overall I have had a tremendous experience at WinReality and would recommend it to any hitter serious about playing at elite levels.
I’ve done a hard reset. Erased everything off my headset. Reloaded the app and in the middle of it loading there was another problem. I’ve contacted customer support and still have the same problem.
You have to pay it sucks

reviews.review_title: Very helpful tool and great service
reviews.review_description: Dante helped me get started today on my program. He is exactly the type of person you would want helping you improve your game. Makes me even more excited to work on my game using this amazing tool.

I just met with my WIN Coach and I’m super pumped to get started. Even in the first few weeks when I didn’t have a plan I was still making tons of improvement and feeling more confident. If you’re looking for a review that can push you to make this purchase, let this be the one. It’s a must for next level athletes.

So far, is still on queue. I paid for the subscription and i just get a message saying that the app  is still being developed.
It has been in queue for a while now. Brand new equipment
It did not say anything about paying $30 a month
I have been trying for 3 weeks to get this setup. Still cant even after Uninstalling it and reinstalling it.

developer_response.body: Hi there, we would be happy to help get you going with your WIN Series Membership. You can contact us at support@winreality.com or visit winreality.com/get-setup

reviews.review_description: We splurged on an Oculus and WIN subscription for our 11-year old son at the end of his little league season. It was a solid season in the field, but most of his hits were grounders, many of them hard, but nothing impressive. He started using WIN the week before his all star tournament, and right away in practice I started seeing him pounding line drives to the outfield. In his first all star game he hit a couple of strong balls to the outfield. In his second, he hit an over the fence homer and an RBI line drive to the outfield. I’m guessing if we’d started him on WIN before his little league season, he might have had a much better time at the plate, because the all star pitchers he faced were good and threw hard. I can’t say how much of his turn around was due to the confidence of having practiced more against “live” pitching versus getting his timing and pitch recognition down, but either way, it’s helped him within the first two weeks. Looking forward to him using it to start sharp through the offseason.
Just got off a call with Dante George from win reality. Great guy, great plan. Really cares about making me the best I can. Nothing but great things to say about this training tool and Coach Dante.

reviews.review_title: It will not let me log in
reviews.review_description: It is dumb and ever time I try to log in it will not let me I give it a 1 star because I can’t even play it

reviews.review_title: Awesome tool for seeing at live pitches
reviews.review_description: I recently started using winreality and I’m already starting to see results everyday I get better and better winreality is a game changer
It keeps on saying that my username and password are wrong but on Facebook it says that it is not wrong.

Biggest complaint is home plate tends to shift pushing you out of your play area. But my son and daughter both love it. A catching option would be really cool. My kids are both catchers so they have taken to doing the pitch recognition but behind the plate practice catching different speeds and pitch types.

We onboarded with Jesse. Who seemed to be very interested in my son's age level and experience so he could help us get the most out of Win Reality. 
Impressed so far.... For a beta app.
I think it should be a little cheaper until they get better.

I just set everything up so I haven't made it to deep into the app yet but so far so good. It really seems like it will help in the process of growing as a hitter and a pitcher. The customer service was amazing. I spoke with Carl on the phone for 1hr as he went over all the details. He also asked about my son wanting to know where he was at and few things he needs to work on so he could send the right training tools to make him succeed.
